uplink.description: Weather report (0x0B type 2 sub 00): mild conditions, SW wind 270 deg
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds weather frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (parseWeather) and normalizing to the vocabulary (inHg->hPa, degF->degC, mph->m/s, rain counts x0.2).

uplink.description: Weather report: calm, low pressure, north wind (dir 0), no rain
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds weather frame; expected.data derived from reference/upstream-codec.js and normalized to the vocabulary.

uplink.description: Weather report: hot, strong wind dir 359, heavy rain, high UV/solar
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds weather frame; expected.data derived from reference/upstream-codec.js and normalized to the vocabulary.

uplink.description: Unsupported uplink id (0x09 metering, not a weather frame)
uplink._note: Synthetic: this codec only handles the 0x0B weather report frame.

uplink.description: Truncated weather frame (header present, body too short)
uplink._note: Synthetic: weather frame requires fields through barTrend (30 data bytes).
